description: Initializes the fixed bus shunt fetching routine ‘NXTFXS’ for returning fixed shunts attached to bus IBUS. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = inifxs(ibus)

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘NXTFXS’ may not be used.
Bus has no fixed shunts; ‘NXTFXS’ may not be used.
